accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text; references to CRA, DOE rule, GAO letter, and legislative history are correct.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the resolution as a CRA disapproval of the DOE student loan rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: States the rule shall have no force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions in the bill; correctly noted.

effective_dates.why: Notes no material future effective dates; correctly reflects the bill.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the targeted rule, its sub-components, the GAO letter, and the operative nullification.

correct_entities.why: DOE, GAO correctly named; Fed. Reg. and Cong. Record citations correct.

correct_figures.why: 87 Fed. Reg. 61512, Oct. 12, 2022, March 17 and 22, 2023 dates and pages S903-S906 all correct.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
